content.en:
Chapter 3129 The situation is reversed!

"Star Winged Six-Armed Shield, first form, defense activated!"

Star-winged six-armed shields appeared around Ye Tian one after another, forming layer after layer, protecting his whole body.

Boom! ! ! !

The blows of many peak world gods bombarded Ye Tian's Star Wings Six-Armed Shield, breaking through layers of Star Wings Six-Armed Shields, but in the end they did not break all the Star Wings Six-Armed Shields.

The peak world gods of Taiwu Tianchao Palace were all dumbfounded when they saw this scene.

"This is a super-dimensional secret treasure, the Star Wings Six-Armed Shield!"

They didn't find it strange when they saw that Ye Tian had a Star-winged Six-Armed Shield, but it was so strange that Ye Tian had so many Star-Winged Six-Armed Shields!

"Damn it, how many materials did Ye Tian get to refine so many super-dimensional secret treasures!"

At this moment, they were all moved.

"Seven or eighty-seven" Not to mention anything else, these super-dimensional secret treasures alone are worth a lot of Jialan treasure coins.

This time, they may have made a lot of money.

But the prerequisite is that Ye Tian must be killed.

At this moment, Ye Tian also took action. He didn't want to sit still and wait for death.

Wow!

Ye Tian used the super-dimensional technique - the super-dimensional world wood to escape the light, and rushed towards these peak world gods, and also activated the ice orchid pearl, flawless pupils, Jialan treasure clothes and other super-dimensional secret treasures, one after another super-dimensional The light surrounds the surroundings and is extremely dazzling.

"Superdimensional Vine!"

This extra-dimensional technique burst out instantly, and vines condensed by the extra-dimensional power attacked these peak world gods.

However, the strength of these peak world gods is not weak, especially the Yonghao world god, who is so powerful that he shattered many of Ye Tian's super-dimensional vines with a wave of his hand.

But Ye Tian is not afraid of these peak world gods. Some peak world gods are still not strong.

puff!

The body of a peak world god was penetrated by the superdimensional vine, and his body was directly shattered. Even Yonghao World God had no time to save him.

There were also several peak world gods who were also severely injured in an instant.

The Sumeru Realm God was severely injured by Ye Tian, ​​and the wounds on his body were difficult to heal. This was an injury caused by extra-dimensional power, and it could not be recovered so easily.

"How can Ye Tian Realm God be so powerful!!!"

The Sumeru Realm God was shocked.

If he had known that Ye Tian was so powerful, he would never have suggested attacking Ye Tian, ​​but now there was no way to end it and he had to do his best to kill Ye Tian.

However, these peak world gods attacked Ye Tian with all their strength, but Ye Tian's defense was too abnormal.

suddenly.

Yonghao Realm God came up with an idea: "Seal him!"

No matter how strong the defense is, as long as Ye Tian is sealed, Ye Tian will be unable to resist and the defense will be ineffective.

Immediately.

Yongwu Realm God and the others mobilized extra-dimensional things and mobilized extra-dimensional power to seal Ye Tian.

In an instant, dense threads of super-dimensional power appeared all around, trying to seal him.

Ye Tian tried his best to attack, but he could only cut off part of the superdimensional power threads, especially the power of Yonghao Realm God was too powerful for him to cut off.

Gradually, he was surrounded by super-dimensional power, and it seemed that he was somewhat helpless.

But Ye Tian didn't panic at all.

suddenly.

He sacrificed another super-dimensional secret treasure. This was a specially broken super-dimensional secret treasure that he had refined over the years - the Sky-Breaking Diamond!

"break!"

Ye Tian shouted.

The Sky-breaking Diamond turned into a stream of light, instantly breaking through the extra-dimensional power that came from the layers of seals, and he rushed out with the Sky-breaking Diamond.

"Another super-dimensional secret treasure!"

Yonghao Realm God was slightly shocked.

How many super-dimensional secret treasures does Ye Tian have?

Boom! ! ! !

Ye Tian continued to fight with these peak world gods. Although he had been relying on multiple star-winged six-arm shields and Galan Treasure Clothes to protect his whole body without any injuries, the consumption of extra-dimensional things was very serious.

Gradually, Yongwu Realm God smiled.

"Ye Tianjie God, you do have a lot of super-dimensional secret treasures, but if you maintain so many super-dimensional secret treasures at the same time, the amount of super-dimensional power you consume must be exaggerated. Now I am afraid that the super-dimensional power in the super-dimensional things is about to be exhausted. Come on. Once the superdimensional power is exhausted, what will you use to fight us?"

Yonghao Realm God laughed wildly.

He had already determined that victory would belong to him, but when he thought about the death of three peak world gods in Taihao Tianchao Palace, he felt heartbroken.

These are all peak world gods who have integrated extra-dimensional objects, and their combat power far exceeds that of ordinary peak world gods!

Soon, after fighting for a while, Ye Tian's extradimensional power was about to be exhausted.

Seeing this scene, Yongwu Realm God burst into laughter.

Then, he held a super-dimensional secret treasure and attacked Ye Tian again.

boom! ! !

The Star Wings Six-Armed Shield was penetrated by Ye Tian, ​​and all were knocked back to their original form.

The attack also landed on Ye Tian's body, almost piercing through Jialan Baoyi, and its powerful impact also made Ye Tian feel uncomfortable, and his body kept flying upside down.

Seeing this scene, these peak world gods were very excited. They knew that Ye Tian finally couldn't hold on any longer.

But suddenly, Ye Tian said with a smile: "Have you forgotten that I have other clones!"

Yonghao Realm God sneered: "What's the point of other clones? If you don't integrate extra-dimensional things, you won't be able to use extra-dimensional techniques, and you won't have much combat effectiveness."

"Really?"

Ye Tian's cloned bodies have arrived one after another. Currently, he only has two cloned bodies left to maintain the Star Dimension Void Heaven Formation. Although it cannot fully activate the Star Dimension Void Heaven Formation, it can at least exert a certain power, allowing Taihao to The support from Tianchao Palace could not come, and the transmission of messages was cut off. This was enough.

and.

During this period of fighting, the human race who should move and hide were also prepared. No matter how hard they fought, the impact would not be serious.

"What's the point of having so many clones? Kill these clones of him!"

Yonghaojie Shinto.

But then, extra-dimensional power emerged from each of Ye Tian's copied bodies, finally causing Yonghaojie's expression to change.

"Is it possible that you have completely mastered the super-dimensional power at 1.8?"

"Impossible. If you completely control the power of the extra dimension, you can easily kill us!"

Yongwu Realm God has to admit that each of Ye Tian's clones has been integrated with extra-dimensional things, but how difficult it is to integrate extra-dimensional things, and how much effort each peak Realm God has to pay.

The cost, how many long years it takes to have the hope of integrating an extra-dimensional object! And how long Ye Tiancai has been practicing and how long he has entered the Death Void, how is it possible that every duplicate body can successfully integrate an extra-dimensional object.

This is unreasonable!

But Yongwu Realm God had no time to think. These cloned bodies of Ye Tian used super-dimensional techniques to kill them one after another, and the super-dimensional techniques of each duplicate body were different.

Suddenly, the situation was reversed.
